history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game match results screen shows two teams facing off with player stats, icons, and a victory headline.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a split-screen scoreboard with two teams labeled on a blue left side and an orange right side, each listing multiple players with small character images, names, and numerical stats, plus columns for K/D/A and DMG. Above the scoreboard, large text reads “MENANG” and “BOOYAH!” and there are additional top-right interface icons.

Setting:
The scene appears to be an outdoor, game-style background with a large, blurred structure and a sky filled with clouds, likely part of a video game interface. Lighting looks like daytime with soft, even illumination and a bright sky.

Visual Details:
The interface uses dark translucent panels with colored headers (blue for the left team, orange for the right team) and a central “VS” divider. The top has bold typography with “MENANG” in yellow and “BOOYAH!” in white. The scoreboard rows include small square character thumbnails, names in white text, and smaller golden or white icons near the right side of each row. At the bottom center there is a highlighted notification bar with text and a right-pointing arrow icon. The camera/view is fixed and front-facing, typical of a game UI overlay. The overall composition is horizontally centered with the scoreboard occupying most of the middle portion.

Visible Text:
CLASH SQUAD
BERMUDA
MENANG
BOOYAH !
HOWLERS
WARBRINGERS
VS
Bertemu pemain toxic? Tekan disini untuk menambah m
STREAK KNOCKDOWN x3
LOBBY
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a video game scoreboard for a match, with one team’s victory indicated by “MENANG” and “BOOYAH!” displayed above. It lists players and their K/D/A and DMG stats for both teams, along with various UI icons and a “LOBBY” button.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
